arts.ttl: What TV channel is Everton vs Liverpool on? How to watch Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Everton host Liverpool in what's set to be the last Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park today (December 7) before the Toffees move into their new Everton Stadium next season

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk made his Jordan Pickford feelings clear when keeper 'tried to apologise'
arts.sum: Liverpool's trip to Goodison Park will see Virgil van Dijk once again face Jordan Pickford, who was responsible for putting the Reds skipper out of action for almost a year

arts.ttl: Why Alexis Mac Allister Isn't Playing vs. Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister is serving a one-game suspension for yellow card accumulation against Everton.

arts.ttl: Everton expert helping Arne Slot as Liverpool boss makes Sean Dyche claim
arts.sum: Arne Slot previews Saturday's Merseyside derby as Liverpool travel to face Everton at Goodison Park for the final time in the league

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate story perfectly sums up Mo Salah amid 'discrimination' towards Liverpool star
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate revealed that Liverpool teammate Mohamed Salah suffered discrimination while visiting Paris but the France international had great respect for how he handled the situation

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool and Tottenham zero in on Sudakov
arts.sum: Both Liverpool and Tottenham have their sights on midfielder Georgiy Sudakov. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Everton host Liverpool in the Premier League in Saturday's Merseyside derby. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: 'I had to quit Everton - now Arne Slot wants Liverpool to sign me before Man City do'
arts.sum: Antonee Robinson has become one of the Premier League's most highly-rated full-backs since parting ways with Everton in 2019, and Arne Slot is said to be eyeing a bid for the USA international

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'in constant talks' to sign £9.4m Xabi Alonso favourite as three-club transfer battle emerges
arts.sum: Liverpool are in constant dialogue over a deal to sign Bayer Leverkusen wing-back Jeremie Frimpong, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota injury latest: Liverpool forward takes big step towards return after Arne Slot update
arts.sum: The forward has missed Liverpool’s last 10 games
